case_title: ANNETTE ELIAS VS. OSCAR ANIBAL GONZALEZ RODRIGUEZ

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR TWO SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETERS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,140.60 FILED BY ELIAS, ANNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ RODRIGUEZ, OSCAR ANIBAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2024 - CONTINUED DUE TO CONDITION OF THE COURT'S CALENDAR TO FEB-22-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE ELIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OSCAR ANIBAL GONZALEZ RODRIGEZ IS PRESENT. PARTIES ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER EUGENIO VIDRIO . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: XXXXXXXX ; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-21-2023 - CONTINUED FOR TWO SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETERS TO DEC-15-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE ELIAS IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS ROSA MARIA CELI. DEFENDANT OSCAR ANIBAL GONZALEZ RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF INFORMS THE COURT THAT HER WITNESS NEEDS THE ASSISTANCE OF A SPANISH-LANGUAGE INTERPRETER, AND THE DEFENDANT INFORMS THE COURT THAT HE NEEDS THE ASSISTANCE OF A SPANISH-LANGUAGE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (D. 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-12-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING [HEARING FEB-22-24 AT 1:30PM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF ELIAS, ANNETTE
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF APR-30-2024 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $0.0. SERVED SEP-26-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALEZ RODRIGUEZ, OSCAR ANIBAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2023 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-25-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE ELIAS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT OSCAR ANIBAL GONZALEZ RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY ELIAS, ANNETTE GONZALEZ RODRIGUEZ, OSCAR ANIBAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2024 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO APR-30-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANNETTE ELIAS IS PRESENT.
